creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: To be accurate, Vulkan Video is already supported but none of the codecs are due to patents (QUEUE_VIDEO_DECODE_BIT_KHR vs. VIDEO_CODEC_OPERATION_DECODE_H264_BIT_KHR). It gets even weirder after https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/-/commit/7b22dd8bfdc3 which disables even non-patented codecs by default.
